holdings.infoBox: GEW is an equity ETF with a total of 455 individual holdings. The top holdings are Invesco S&P 500 Low Volatility ETF stock at 5.83%, Walmart at 1.97%, Exxon Mobil at 1.54%, Berkshire Hathaway at 1.27%, and Palo Alto Networks at 1.24%.

overview.description: The Cambria Global EW ETF (GEW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to provide diversified exposure to global equities. The fund aims to avoid overconcentration risk by taking a more balanced weighting approach to portfolio holdings, which may include other ETFs. GEW was launched on Sep 25, 2025 and is issued by Cambria.
